recommendations.title: Premam
recommendations.overview: Three stages in George's life, and three girls he encounters in each stage.

recommendations.title: Patrick
recommendations.overview: A woman's chaotic life becomes more complicated when she inherits her grandmother's dog.

recommendations.title: Bad Taste
recommendations.overview: A team from the intergalactic fast food chain Crumb's Crunchy Delights descends on Earth, planning to make human flesh the newest taste sensation. After they wipe out the New Zealand town Kaihoro, the country’s Astro-Investigation and Defense Service

recommendations.title: Eddie Murphy Raw
recommendations.overview: Eddie Murphy delights, shocks and entertains with dead-on celebrity impersonations, observations on '80s love, sex and marriage, a remembrance of Mom's hamburgers and much more.

recommendations.title: Full of It
recommendations.overview: A teenager tells outrageous lies at his new high school, only to have them suddenly come true.

recommendations.title: Napoleon Dynamite
recommendations.overview: A listless and alienated teenager decides to help his new friend win the class presidency in their small western high school, while he must deal with his bizarre family life back home.

recommendations.title: The Red Turtle
recommendations.overview: The dialogue-less film follows the major life stages of a castaway on a deserted tropical island populated by turtles, crabs and birds.

recommendations.title: Corrina, Corrina
recommendations.overview: When Manny Singer's wife dies, his young daughter Molly becomes mute and withdrawn. To help cope with looking after Molly, he hires sassy housekeeper Corrina Washington, who coaxes Molly out of her shell and shows father and daughter a whole new way

recommendations.title: Family Resemblances
recommendations.overview: An upper middle-class French family celebrates a birthday in a restaurant. In one evening and during one meal, family history, tensions, collective and separate grudges, delights, and memories both clash and coalesce.

recommendations.title: Daddy, I'm a Zombie
recommendations.overview: The misadventures of a teenager girl in her new life as zombie.
